sections.description: The cabinet lights up and states the hook cleanly.
The hook starts winning, not just repeating.
The room keeps humming after the player steps away.
The hook is withheld, then arrives like it always belonged here.

issues.message: arcade-bells overruns the phrase boundary by 0.110 beats.
arcade-lead overruns the phrase boundary by 0.550 beats.

rhythm.summary: 100% of note events carry rhythm roles, 100% anchor downbeat presence, 0 offbeat-only bars
insights: Rhythmic bar roles cover 16 of 16 bars.
Anchor voice articulates the downbeat in 100% of its active bars.
Every active bar retains at least one strong-beat articulation.

issues.message: Arrival and cadence bars are not rhythmically weightier than continuation bars, so phrase roles may blur.
Section "arcade-clear" is marked as cadence but only 18% of its notes land on strong beats.
